steps.title: Solve for the variable
steps.content: Start with the given equation and isolate $x$: $$6x+5=23$$ $$6x=18$$ $$x=3$$ This value satisfies the condition in the question, so it can be used in the requested expression.

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: Substitute $x=3$ into $12x-7$: $$12x-7=12(3)-7=36-7=29$$ The computation uses the value of $x$ from the given equation and answers exactly what the question asks for. The answer is 29.
